container_definitions.description: A list of valid container definitions provided as a single valid JSON document. Please note that you should only provide values that are part of the container definition document.

family.description: The family of your task definition, used as the definition name

cpu.description: Number of cpu units used by the task. If the requires_compatibilities is FARGATE this field is required.

enable_fault_injection.description: Whether to enable fault injection for the task.

execution_role_arn.description: ARN of the task execution role that the Amazon ECS container agent and the Docker daemon can assume

inference_accelerator.description: Configuration block for the inference accelerator.

ipc_mode.description: IPC mode to use for the containers in the task

memory.description: Amount (in MiB) of memory used by the task. If the requires_compatibilities is FARGATE this field is required.

network_mode.description: Docker networking mode to use for the containers in the task

runtime_platform.description: Configuration block for the runtime platform of the task definition.

pid_mode.description: PID mode to use for the containers in the task

proxy_configuration.description: Configuration block for the proxy configuration.
proxy_configuration.type: list(object({container_name: string, properties: map(string), type: string}))

ephemeral_storage.description: Configuration block for the ephemeral storage settings.

requires_compatibilities.description: Set of launch types required by the task

skip_destroy.description: Whether to skip destroying the task definition.

tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

task_role_arn.description: ARN of the task role that containers in the task may assume

track_latest.description: Whether to track the latest revision of the task definition.

volume.type: list(object({name: string, host_path: string, docker_volume_configuration: list(object({autoprovision: bool, driver_opts: map(string), driver: string, labels: map(string), scope: string})), efs_volume_configuration: list(object({file_system_id: string, root_directory: string, transit_encryption: string, transit_encryption_port: number, authorization_config:list(object({iam: string, access_point_id: string}))})), fsx_windows_file_server_volume_configuration: list(object({authorization_config: list(object({credentials_parameter: string, domain: string})), file_system_id: string, root_directory: string})), configure_at_launch: optional(bool)}))
